pi_items.source: verifier.py:69,75 - both count_best and count_lowres must be > 5000 to pass scoring

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the CT Cranium DICOM dataset (case 0051) from the official InVesalius project GitHub release (v3.0/0051.zip at https://github.com/invesalius/invesalius3/releases/download/v3.0/0051.zip). This is real, publicly available medical imaging data, not synthetic. Output files must be created at /home/ga/Documents/skull_best.stl and /home/ga/Documents/skull_lowres.stl with both containing more than 5000 triangles and a quality ratio of at least 1.2 (best > lowres × 1.2).
